purpose: User-facing intake schema for SmartWork SIAGA attendance automation.

requiredUserFields.teacherId: Unique local worker id, example: guru-001
requiredUserFields.teacherName: Display name for report and UI
requiredUserFields.wa: Optional WhatsApp number for future notification

apps.username: Local-only username. Never send to chat.
apps.password: Local-only password. Never send to chat.

forbiddenUserFields.jamMasuk: User must not manually define SIAGA jam masuk.
forbiddenUserFields.jamPulang: User must not manually define SIAGA jam pulang.
forbiddenUserFields.saveMode: User confirmation must happen at execution time, not by default form value.
